title: geonoma interrupta subsp. purdieana
intro: Geonoma interrupta subsp. purdieana, also known as the Puri's geonoma palm, is a type of palm tree native to the tropical forests of South America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, and its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Geonoma interrupta subsp. purdieana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, ointments, and salves.
